creator: wilmar94do@hotmail.com
text:
I am also hitting this error and I have also the gptboot.sym that gives the same error:

```
===> usr.sbin/iovctl (all)
/usr/local/aarch64-unknown-freebsd13.0/bin/ld: boot1.sym: error: PHDR segment not covered by LOAD segment
/usr/local/aarch64-unknown-freebsd13.0/bin/ld: gptboot.sym: error: PHDR segment not covered by LOAD segment
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
===> usr.bin/fsync (all)
--- gptboot.sym ---
*** [gptboot.sym] Error code 1

make[5]: stopped in /usr/src/stand/efi/gptboot
1 error

make[5]: stopped in /usr/src/stand/efi/gptboot
--- all_subdir_stand/efi/gptboot ---

make[4]: stopped in /usr/src/stand/efi
--- boot1.sym ---
*** [boot1.sym] Error code 1

make[5]: stopped in /usr/src/stand/efi/boot1
1 error
```
